name: Kerberoasting Attempt
description: Detects potential Kerberoasting attacks requesting service tickets
query:
// Kerberoasting Detection
// Multiple TGS requests for different services from single user
events from authentication
where event_type = "kerberos_tgs_request"
  and encryption_type = "RC4"
group by username
having count(distinct service_name) > 10
within 300 seconds
